payload.answer: I’m not updating this yet because I have Sara recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a correction, or a different Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement uses the same name, Sara, as an existing memory, but assigns a different family relationship. Sara could be a different person, the earlier memory could need correction, or both relationships could be intentionally true in a special circumstance.

details: Detected a conflicting family relationship for Sara.
No durable memory was committed pending clarification.

repair_options: Replace the existing relationship with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing relationship: Sara is my daughter.
Create a separate Sara who is my niece.
Record both relationships if Sara is intentionally both your daughter and your niece.
